Est. 2015 • Sheger, Burayu, Ethiopia

Nurturing Creative
Talent Through Practice

Fostering a community of artists, creators, and professionals. Join Harmony College and transform your passion into a rewarding career in the creative and digital industries.

Our Schools

Diverse Academic Ecosystems

Visual Arts & Photography

Master the art of capturing moments through professional photography, videography, and visual storytelling.

Explore Ecosystem

Theatrical Art & Filmmaking

Develop your voice on stage and behind the camera — from acting and directing to full film production.

Explore Ecosystem

Music Instruments & Vocal

Train with professional musicians across a wide range of instruments and develop your vocal artistry.

Explore Ecosystem

Cubase & Music Production

Learn professional music production, beat-making, mixing, and mastering using industry-standard Cubase software.

Explore Ecosystem

Graphic Design & Digital Marketing

Build a career in creative design and digital marketing — from brand identity to social media campaigns.

Explore Ecosystem

Journalism, IT & Languages

Develop skills in media reporting, information technology, and multilingual communication for today's connected world.

Explore Ecosystem

#1

Top Creative College in Sheger & Burayu Region, 2025.

The Harmony Advantage

Practical Skills, Real Results

Expert Instructors1:15 Student Ratio

Learn directly from working professionals with real industry experience.

Industry Connections30+ Industry Partners

Internship and placement links with local media, agencies, and studios.

Professional Studios6 Dedicated Studios

Access to fully equipped studios for photography, music, film, and design.

Career-Ready Graduates90% Placement Rate

Programs built for immediate employment in Ethiopia's growing creative economy.

Life on Campus

A sanctuary for innovation and personal growth, where heritage meets the future.

Academic Sanctuary

Historical Sterling Library

Built in 1895 and modernized in 2024, housing over 1.2 million volumes, holographic study bays, and collaborative research pods. Features an impressive multi-tier high vaulted glass atrium with continuous soft natural light.

Open 24/7 for Scholars Live Load: 65%
Student Hub

The Golden Crest Café & Commons

An organic, artisan coffee house and cooperative student dining center. Serving shade-grown coffee cultivated in the university’s own botanical conservatory and fresh bakes made by culinary partners.

7:00 AM - 11:00 PM Daily Live Load: 82%
Recreational Arena

Vance High-Performance Athletics Center

Featuring Olympic-sized indoor thermal swimming pools, custom running loops, weightrooms, and fully monitored physiological tracking centers built for both student-athletes and casual gym-goers.

5:00 AM - Midnight Daily Live Load: 40%
Eco-Living Lab

Botanical Research Conservatory

A massive temperature-controlled biome housing over 400 species of tropical and arid plants. Serving as a living research space for Agriculture students, as well as a peaceful, humid quiet-study escape.

8:00 AM - 8:00 PM Daily Live Load: 25%

Success Stories

What Our Alumni Say

"Harmony College changed my life completely. I came in with no camera experience and left with a professional portfolio and clients. The instructors treat you like a real artist from day one."

Meron Alemu

Class of 2024 • Commercial Photographer, Addis Ababa

Admission Roadmap

Begin Your Journey

Track your real-time admission checklist progress. Complete each sub-action on the right to complete the respective milestone steps!

Roadmap Progress0% Complete

Awaiting step 1 application submission.

1

Submit Application

Deliver transcript & portfolios.

2

Portfolio Review

Ecosystem matching assessment.

3

Academic Interview

Collaborative vision alignment.

4

Final Enrollment

Matriculate & secure residency.

Active Milestone Area • Step 1

Submit Application

The first step in your journey at Harmony College is submitting your details and choosing your preferred program. You can apply through our online portal or drop off a completed form at our campus in Sheger, Burayu infront of Burayu City Administration.

Checkpoint 1 of 4

Intellectual Highlights & Events

Events
Jul 10, 2026 By Harmony College Communications Team

Harmony College Photography Exhibition Opens in Burayu

Students from the Visual Arts department showcased their semester work in a public exhibition held at the Burayu City Administration Hall, drawing over 300 visitors.

Read Post
Campus
Jun 22, 2026 By Campus News Bureau

New Music Production Studio Inaugurated at Harmony College

Harmony College officially opens its professional Cubase recording studio, giving music production and vocal students access to broadcast-quality audio equipment.

Read Post
Research
Jun 05, 2026 By Alumni Affairs Office

Harmony Graduates Land Roles in Addis Media and Design Agencies

A record number of Harmony College graduates from the Graphic Design, Digital Marketing, and Journalism programs secured professional placements within three months of graduation.

Read Post
Admissions Open for 2025/2026

Your Creative Future Starts Here

Harmony College is now enrolling. Take the first step toward a professional career in photography, music, design, film, journalism, IT, or languages.

HARMONYCOLLEGE

Nurturing creative and professional talent in photography, music, design, and media since 2015. Located in Sheger, Burayu — infront of Burayu City Administration.

Address: Sheger, Burayu, Infront of Burayu City Administration

Phone: +251 911 000 000 • admissions@harmonycollege.edu.et
